hero.title: Experience Luxury Makeup
hero.subtitle: Transform your beauty with expert artistry. From bridal elegance to red-carpet glamour, every look is crafted to perfection.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: The Art of Beauty
about.heading: Crafting Beauty, One Brushstroke at a Time
about.description: Founded in 2019, Glamed by Anna has been the premier destination for luxury makeup artistry in Tanzania. Our passion is enhancing natural beauty with techniques that celebrate individuality and elegance.
about.mission: Every face is a canvas, and every brushstroke tells a story. We believe that confidence begins with feeling beautiful in your own skin.
about.story: Founded in 2019, Glamed by Anna has been the premier destination for luxury makeup artistry in Tanzania.
about.quote: "Beauty is power; a smile is its sword."

bridal.title: Your Dream Wedding Look
bridal.subtitle: Because every bride deserves to feel extraordinary
bridal.heading: Your Dream Wedding Look
bridal.description: Your wedding day deserves nothing less than perfection. Our bridal experience is a curated journey from consultation to the final touch, ensuring you feel radiant and confident as you walk down the aisle.
bridal.testimonialQuote: Anna made me feel like a queen on my wedding day. The makeup lasted all night and I've never felt more beautiful.

checklist.touchup: Touch-up kit for the entire day

process.title: Our Glam Process
process.subtitle: How We Work
process.step1Desc: We discuss your vision, skin type, and desired look to create a personalized plan.
process.step2Desc: A full trial run ensures every detail is perfected before your big day.
process.step3Desc: On the day, we arrive prepared with premium products for a flawless application.
process.step4Desc: You shine with confidence — a look that lasts and photographs beautifully.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: The Journey of Glamed by Anna

hero.description: Discover the artistry, passion, and dedication behind every transformation.

story.heading: Where It All Began
story.subtitle: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Glamed by Anna was born from a simple belief: every woman deserves to feel beautiful, confident, and unforgettable. Founded in 2019 by Anna, our studio has become Tanzania's premier destination for luxury makeup artistry.
story.paragraph2: What started as a passion for enhancing natural beauty has grown into a full-service beauty studio that transforms women for their most important moments.
story.paragraph3: Our approach combines technical expertise with artistic vision. We use only premium products, stay current with global trends, and customize every look.

meetAnna.title: Meet Anna
meetAnna.subtitle: The Artist Behind the Brush
meetAnna.name: Anna
meetAnna.paragraph1: Anna is a certified professional makeup artist with over 5 years of experience in the beauty industry. Trained at leading makeup academies and constantly refining her skills, Anna brings international standards to Tanzania.
meetAnna.paragraph2: Her work has been featured at weddings, fashion shows, editorial shoots, and corporate events. Her signature style blends classic elegance with modern trends.
meetAnna.paragraph3: Beyond her technical skill, Anna is known for her warm personality and ability to make every client feel comfortable, heard, and genuinely cared for.
meetAnna.quote: Makeup is more than just products. It's about understanding my client's vision, enhancing their natural beauty, and giving them the confidence to shine.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To empower women through the art of makeup, helping them discover their most beautiful, confident selves while providing an experience that feels luxurious, personalized, and unforgettable.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be Tanzania's most trusted luxury makeup brand, recognized for excellence, innovation, and the ability to make every woman feel like the best version of herself.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.heading: What We Stand For
values.authenticityDesc: We enhance natural beauty, never mask it
values.innovationDesc: We stay ahead of global beauty trends
values.integrityDesc: We're honest about what works for you
values.joyDesc: We celebrate beauty in all its forms

purpose.heading: Our Purpose
purpose.subtitle: Why We Do What We Do

cta.description: Whether it's your wedding day, a special celebration, or simply a day you want to feel extraordinary — we're here to make it happen.

meta.title: About Us | Glamed by Anna
meta.description: Discover the story behind Glamed by Anna, Tanzania's premier luxury makeup studio. Meet Anna, explore our values, and see why 500+ women trust us.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Premium beauty services crafted for your unique elegance
services.gridSubtitle: Every service is tailored to enhance your natural beauty
services.metaDescription: Explore Glamed by Anna's luxury makeup services including bridal, soft glam, luxury glam, and more.

bridal-makeup.title: Bridal Makeup
bridal-makeup.description: Transform your wedding day into a fairytale with our signature bridal makeup. Our expert artists will create a timeless look that photographs beautifully and lasts through your entire celebration.

soft-glam.title: Soft Glam
soft-glam.description: Effortlessly elegant soft glam that enhances your natural beauty. Perfect for daytime events and sophisticated occasions.

natural-glam.title: Natural Glam
natural-glam.description: Look like the best version of yourself with our natural glam service. Subtle enhancement that lets your true beauty shine.

luxury-glam.title: Luxury Glam
luxury-glam.description: Red carpet-ready luxury makeup for your most glamorous moments. Full coverage, dramatic eyes, and flawless finish.

graduation-makeup.title: Graduation Makeup
graduation-makeup.description: Celebrate your academic achievement with makeup that makes you feel accomplished and beautiful. Perfect for graduation photos and ceremonies.

party-makeup.title: Party Makeup
party-makeup.description: Turn heads at your next party with our glamorous party makeup. Glitter, shimmer, and high-impact looks for unforgettable nights.

traditional-makeup.title: Traditional Makeup
traditional-makeup.description: Honor your culture with our traditional makeup services. We understand the unique requirements of traditional ceremonies.

photoshoot-makeup.title: Photoshoot Makeup
photoshoot-makeup.description: Professional makeup designed specifically for the camera. Every detail is perfect for your photoshoot.

home-service.title: Home Service
home-service.description: Luxury makeup in the comfort of your own home. Our artists come to you for convenience and privacy.

hair-styling.title: Hair Styling
hair-styling.description: Complete your look with professional hair styling that complements your makeup perfectly.

lashes.title: Lashes
lashes.description: Premium lash application for stunning, fluttery eyes. Available in various styles from natural to dramatic.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from our beautiful clients
testimonials.metaDescription: Read testimonials from Glamed by Anna's 500+ happy clients. Wedding, graduation, and party makeup reviews.
testimonials.t1: Anna made me feel like a queen on my wedding day. The makeup lasted all night and I've never felt more beautiful.
testimonials.t2: Absolutely professional and talented. My graduation photos look stunning thanks to Anna's incredible work.
testimonials.t3: The best makeup experience I've ever had. Anna listened to what I wanted and exceeded my expectations.
testimonials.t4: My bridal makeup was perfection. Anna's attention to detail is unmatched.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services
faq.ctaDescription: We're here to help. Reach out and we'll answer everything.
faq.metaDescription: Find answers to frequently asked questions about Glamed by Anna's makeup services, booking process, and policies.
faq.q1: How do I book an appointment?
faq.a1: You can book an appointment through our website's booking form, or contact us directly via WhatsApp at 0655737871.
faq.q2: Do I need to pay a deposit?
faq.a2: Yes, we require a 50% deposit to confirm your booking. The remaining balance is due on the day of service.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept M-Pesa, bank transfer, and cash payments.
faq.q4: How should I prepare for my appointment?
faq.a4: Come with a clean, moisturized face. If you have any skin concerns, let us know during consultation.
faq.q5: Can I bring my own products?
faq.a5: Absolutely! We're happy to use your preferred products if you have allergies or special preferences.
faq.q6: When should I book my bridal makeup?
faq.a6: We recommend booking at least 3-6 months before your wedding, especially during peak season.
faq.a7: Yes! Every bridal booking includes a trial session to perfect your look before the big day.
faq.a8: Yes, we offer home service and travel to various locations. A travel fee applies depending on distance.
faq.a9: We primarily serve Mbeya and surrounding areas. For other locations, please contact us for availability.
faq.a10: We use professional, high-quality products from leading brands. We prioritize skin health and use products suitable for all skin types.
faq.q11: Do you cater to sensitive skin?
faq.a11: Yes, we have hypoallergenic products and can accommodate most skin sensitivities. Please inform us during booking.
faq.a12: Cancellations must be made at least 48 hours in advance for a full deposit refund. Last-minute cancellations may forfeit the deposit.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Glamed by Anna. Visit our studio at Mahakama Avenue, Mbeya, or book via WhatsApp.
